name: customer-register
description: CRUD for a customers table plus flexible lookup (by customer number, phone, or SSN with format normalisation) and an optional cross-table transaction history aggregator.
postInstall: 1. Add `customers` to the schema map exported by lib/db/schema (or your equivalent index)
2. Push the schema: drizzle-kit push (or run db/migrations/customers.sql manually)
3. The history route requires sales/repair/order/invoice/pickup tables — delete it or trim its references if you don't have all of them
4. Adjust generateCustomerNumber() if you need a different numbering format
5. ssnVariants() is Sweden-specific — drop or replace for other locales
